_description: Exchange format between the RAG system and the WordPress plugin. Generated by bridge_export.py. Consumed by the WP plugin admin import. Tags and categories are intentionally excluded (Option B).

_fields.id: integer  — WordPress post ID. Primary key in rag_posts.
_fields.title: string   — Plain text title (title.rendered, HTML stripped).
_fields.url: string   — Canonical post URL (link field from WP REST API).
_fields.date: string   — Publication date, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (truncated from date field).
_fields.slug: string   — URL slug (slug field from WP REST API). Plain string, no resolution needed.
_fields.excerpt: string   — Short summary, plain text (excerpt.rendered, HTML stripped). May be empty.
_fields.text: string   — Full article body, plain text (content.rendered, HTML stripped).

_example.title: AI-Augmented Journalism: Practical Implementation of Semantic Clustering, Multilingual Transcription, and WordPress Automation
_example.excerpt: A practical walkthrough of AI-augmented journalism tools built on semantic clustering and WordPress automation.
_example.text: It has been ages since I have written anything...
